prose: Formaldehyde frontier-orbital gap calculated using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', with density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was the user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz file (4 atoms: O, C, H, H), run as a single point without re-relaxation. SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO energy = −7.652 eV (orbital index 7), LUMO energy = −1.783 eV (orbital index 8), HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans vertical gap) = 5.8696712 eV. No warnings. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy=true.
